column1: # Mapping between a maintainer email and a GitHub login (applied both ways).
# Some MAINTAINERS files list a person by name and email only (no @handle)
# with a handle that doesn't resolve. This file maps such emails to the correct
# GitHub login so the maintainer is matched against the write-access set instead
# Each row is also applied in reverse: when a maintainer's GitHub login matches

column2: their email is overridden with the address from this file.
github_id (one per line; lines starting with # are ignored).

column1: # The mapping takes precedence over the handle and email in the MAINTAINERS file.
